input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git branch --show-current && git branch -r | head -30 && echo "---" && git ls-remote --heads origin 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "ls-remote failed"
input.description: Check current branch and remote branches

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git branch -r | grep -E 'feat/concierge|issue-131' && git ls-remote --heads origin 'feat/concierge-artifact-github-tools' 'architecture-design/issue-131' 'coder/issue-131' 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check if current branch exists on origin

content.text:
Yes. Your current branch **`feat/concierge-artifact-github-tools`** is on `origin` as `origin/feat/concierge-artifact-github-tools` (tip `21fd81c`).

Related to the issue-131 design you have open, these also exist on `origin`:

- `origin/architecture-design/issue-131`
- `origin/coder/issue-131`

If you meant a different branch name, say which one and I can check that specifically.
